buckets.description: Collapses source-attributed competing survey, legal, or regulatory accounts into a single resolved fact.
Drops the surveyor, party, regulator, witness, or document that owns a claim.
Misses claim, deductible, share, attachment, limit, or net-difference arithmetic support.
Confuses Harbour Mutual H&M underwriter role with its P&I club role.
Misstates cover suspension start, end, duration, or costs inside/outside the window.
Confuses late notice, attachment trigger, conditional future trigger, and assured entitlement.
Treats salvage security or guarantee as an actual paid award.
Drops the sanctions/trading-warranty chain because it is not presently raised as a defense.
Confuses DAM, Panama, Lloyds arbitration, class society, and party positions.
Fails to preserve substantive technical content from Russian, Greek, or French witness statements.
Resolves the five navigation positions instead of preserving their distinct epistemic status.
Treats legal citations as case findings or endorsements rather than authority cited for an argument.
Keeps superseded time, amount, or measurement as current, or misses significance of correction.
Treats loss-of-hire or cover-suspension interpretation as objective fact instead of unresolved dispute.
Mixes H&M, P&I, reinsurance, retrocession, salvage, and regulatory instruments.
